changes_summary: Revised to address FLAG-001 (generation lineage). Key changes: (1) Added `based_on` field to `CreateGenerationTaskArgs` interface in Step 2. (2) Each new builder function now includes lineage fields matching what the in-app hooks pass — `based_on` for img2img/magic-edit/video-enhance, `generation_id` for upscale. (3) Step 3 now extracts `sourceGenerationId` from `selectedReferenceClips[0]?.generation_id` and passes it through to `createGenerationTask`. (4) Added lineage verification to test criteria in Step 5. (5) Updated Validation Order to include lineage field check. `source_variant_id` is documented as an acceptable omission since `SelectedClipPayload` doesn't carry variant info.
questions: For model selection on image-to-video: the travel_between_images resolver reads model_name — does it accept 'ltx-2.3' / 'ltx-2.3-fast' as-is, or does it expect the worker model names ('ltx2_22B', 'ltx2_22B_distilled')? Need to verify during implementation.
Are there existing tests for the agent tools, or is this only tested manually via the agent chat?

success_criteria.criterion: All 10 task types (5 existing + 5 new) are present in the tool schema enum and route to the correct create-task family
Model selection works for text-to-image (wan/z-image/qwen-image) and image-to-video (wan/ltx-2.3/ltx-2.3-fast)
Each new builder function produces an input object matching the corresponding resolver's required fields
Validation correctly enforces required params per task type (e.g. video_url for video-enhance, reference_image_urls for image-to-image)
Generation lineage is preserved: based_on is passed for img2img/magic-edit/video-enhance/character-animate, generation_id for upscale, derived from selectedClip.generation_id
System prompt includes examples and model guide for all new task types
No changes to create-task edge function or any resolver files
Existing tests (if any) continue to pass
Builder functions include only essential params, letting resolver defaults handle the rest
Tool schema descriptions are clear enough for Claude to route correctly without ambiguity
Each new generation path tested end-to-end through the agent chat

assumptions: Masked edit is excluded — the agent cannot draw masks, making this task type impractical without a separate mask-drawing UI step.
Crossfade-join, join-clips, edit-video-orchestrator, and individual-travel-segment are excluded — complex orchestration tasks not suited to single-shot agent calls.
For image-upscale and video-enhance, prompt is not semantically meaningful. The plan relaxes the prompt requirement for these task types.
The model names exposed to the LLM agent ('z-image', 'qwen-image') match the image_generation resolver's expected model_name values and need no mapping.

source_variant_id is unavailable from the agent path — SelectedClipPayload has generation_id but not variant_id. This is an acceptable loss: the agent operates at clip/generation level. Lineage is still tracked via based_on/generation_id.
video_url is a new tool schema property (not reusing reference_image_urls) because video inputs are semantically different and the agent needs clear type guidance.
